CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '2') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '108') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '104') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '101') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '106') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '115') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '51') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '110') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '111') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '114') , EndDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '116') , EndDate, null)))))))))))
CustomField.label: VIZ EndDate
